# Prompt System Packet Template

Use this template when the desk must hand work to another desk or implementation agent.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
current_stage: prompt-systems-desk
capability_id:
user_goal:
acceptance_criteria:
risk_tier:
approval_state:
source_facts:
assumptions:
open_questions:
prompt_surface:
prompt_layers:
message_boundaries:
context_sources:
context_assembly_order:
behavior_contracts:
output_contract:
prompt_fixtures:
regression_slices:
refusal_defer_rules:
prompt_injection_controls:
tool_boundary_rules:
retrieval_boundary_rules:
observability_hooks:
validation_gates:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
